scenarios.description: parseBodyFragment(String bodyHtml, String baseUri) returns a Document with body fragment and correct baseUri
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().html() equals input fragment, baseUri equals provided

scenarios.description: parseBodyFragment(String bodyHtml) uses empty baseUri and returns Document with fragment
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.body().html() equals input fragment, baseUri is empty

scenarios.description: parse(Path path, String charsetName, String baseUri) loads HTML from Path with explicit charset
scenarios.precondition: temp file exists with HTML content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.select("h1").text() equals file content, baseUri equals provided
pseudocode: TEST TC22 parse Path with charset and baseUri

Path p = create temp file with "

Head

" in UTF-8;

scenarios.description: parse(Path path, String charsetName, String baseUri, Parser parser) uses custom parser on Path
scenarios.precondition: temp file exists with XML content
scenarios.expectedResult: Document.select("item").text() equals element value, baseUri equals provided
pseudocode: TEST TC23 parse Path with parser
Path p = create temp file with "<item>9</item>" UTF-8;
Document doc = Jsoup.parse(p, charset, baseUri, xmlParser);

scenarios.description: parse(URL url, int timeoutMillis) returns Document for successful HTTP GET
scenarios.precondition: mock HttpConnection.connect to return Connection that returns known Document
pseudocode: MockedStatic<HttpConnection> stub = mock static HttpConnection.connect(url) to return conn;
